verdict_summary: Extracted 1 WS upgrade entry with 11 frames covering 5 distinct commands (add_turn / update_turn / create_chat / create_chat_response / create_and_generate_turn) from #739 HAR; all 3 outputs token-free and ready for diff vs #695 baseline.
notes: add_turn command name CONFIRMED unchanged in new SPA bundle (per #739 finding). Schema observations vs legacy expectations: (a) add_turn payload now wraps content under turn.candidates[].raw_content with editor{author_id,name} and is_final flag - dev should diff against #695 baseline at this path; (b) update_turn frames carry generation_mode {mode, remaining_quota_frac} which may be new field for quota signaling; (c) candidates contain model_type=MODEL_TYPE_DEEP_SYNTH_LITE (model identifier visible in stream); (d) chat_info.type=TYPE_ONE_ON_ONE is consistently included on receive frames; (e) c2s create_and_generate_turn carries large previous_annotations object (22 boolean-ish counters: boring/not_boring/inaccurate/.../helpful/not_helpful) which is field-rich and worth diffing for new annotation categories vs baseline; (f) all observed frames are JSON-parseable (11/11). No new top-level command names detected beyond the documented set.
